role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Agent correctly identified the absence of visible text and abstained from linguistic analysis, adhering to its domain constraints.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation, and climate cues (flatness, green grass, maritime clouds).
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed plant life (rapeseed, grasslands) and agricultural patterns.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Evaluated road infrastructure, specifically the separated cycle paths and street lighting standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain features (church architecture, street furniture) to distinguish between European candidates.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline executed flawlessly. All agents stayed within their domains, provided image-grounded evidence, and correctly identified Denmark as the most likely candidate based on the distinctive church architecture and infrastructure. The final prediction matches the ground truth.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of flat terrain and green grass match the image perfectly.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Identification of temperate grasslands and distant rapeseed is consistent with the visual evidence.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Observations of the separated cycle path and minimalist street lamps are accurate.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Descriptions of the white church and street furniture align with the image.

tournament_failure.failure_reasoning: The pipeline correctly predicted Denmark, which is the ground truth.
